# Find the Right Skill

<!-- Auto-generated from rankings.json — do not edit manually -->

Start with your situation. Find the phase you're in, then the problem you're facing.

## Phases

- [Validate Your Idea](#1-validate) (4 scenarios)
- [Build Your Product](#2-build) (10 scenarios)
- [Ship & Deploy](#3-ship) (12 scenarios)
- [Get Found](#4-get-found) (11 scenarios)
- [Get Customers](#5-acquire) (7 scenarios)
- [Convert Visitors](#6-convert) (8 scenarios)

---

## Validate Your Idea

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| I have an idea but don't know if anyone would pay for it | Unvalidated idea, risk of building something nobody wants | `office-hours` 📋, `brainstorming` 📋 |
| I don't know who my target customer is or how to describe my product | Unclear positioning, ICP, or value proposition | `product-marketing-context` 📋 |
| I have a plan but I'm not sure if the scope is right | Scope uncertainty — too ambitious or not ambitious enough | `plan-ceo-review` 📋 |
| I need to understand the competitive landscape | Don't know how competitors position or what alternatives exist | `competitor-alternatives` 📋 |

## Build Your Product

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| I have requirements but need to plan the implementation | Complex task that needs breaking down before writing code | `writing-plans` 📋, `executing-plans` 📋 |
| I need to build a frontend that looks professional | Need production-grade UI, not generic AI-looking output | `frontend-design` 📋, `design-consultation` 📋 |
| I want someone to check my architecture before I build | Risk of structural issues, wrong patterns, or missed edge cases | `plan-eng-review` 📋, `plan-design-review` 📋 |
| I have a bug and I don't know why | Unexpected behavior, test failures, or errors | `investigate` 📋 |
| I want to implement a feature with proper test coverage | Need confidence that new code works and doesn't break existing code | `test-driven-development` 📋 |
| I have multiple independent tasks to do at once | Sequential work is too slow, tasks don't depend on each other | `subagent-driven-development` 📋 |
| I got code review feedback and I'm not sure I agree with all of it | Need to evaluate feedback critically, not just accept blindly | `receiving-code-review` 📋 |
| I want to work on a feature without affecting the main branch | Need isolation for risky or long-running changes | `using-git-worktrees` 📋 |
| I want to create a reusable skill for my own workflow | Repetitive workflow that should be automated as a skill | `writing-skills` 📋 |
| I want another AI to review or challenge my code | Need an independent perspective on code quality | `codex` 📋 |

## Ship & Deploy

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| My code is ready, I want to create a PR and ship it | Need full ship workflow: tests, review, version bump, PR | `ship` 📋 |
| I want to review the diff before landing this PR | Need to catch security issues, side effects, or structural problems | `review` 📋 |
| PR is approved, I want to merge and verify production | Need to merge, wait for CI, and confirm production health | `land-and-deploy` 📋, `setup-deploy` 📋 |
| I need to QA test my app and fix bugs | Don't know if the app works correctly end-to-end | `qa` 📋, `qa-only` 📋, `browse` ⭐ |
| I need to test pages that require login | Headless browser doesn't have my session/cookies | `setup-browser-cookies` 📋, `browse` ⭐ |
| The app works but the design looks off | Spacing, alignment, hierarchy, or consistency issues | `design-review` 📋 |
| I want to make sure my changes didn't slow things down | Need before/after performance comparison | `benchmark` 📋 |
| I just deployed, I want to watch for errors | Need to catch post-deploy regressions quickly | `canary` 📋 |
| I shipped a feature, now docs are outdated | README, CHANGELOG, and other docs don't match what shipped | `document-release` 📋 |
| What did we ship this week? What went well? | Need structured retrospective with data | `retro` 📋 |
| I'm touching production systems and don't want to break anything | Risk of destructive commands or accidental changes | `guard` 📋, `careful` 📋 |
| I want to check my app for vulnerabilities before launch | Need to find real security issues, not just theoretical ones | `shannon` 📋 |

## Get Found

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| My site isn't showing up in Google search results | Technical SEO issues, missing meta tags, or poor content | `seo-audit` 📝 |
| I want ChatGPT and Perplexity to mention my product | Content isn't structured for AI citation or extraction | `ai-seo` 📝 |
| My search results don't show stars, FAQs, or other rich data | Missing structured data / JSON-LD markup | `schema-markup` 📝 |
| I want to rank for hundreds of keywords at scale | Can't manually create pages for every keyword variation | `programmatic-seo` 📝 |
| I'm building a new site and need to plan the page hierarchy | Unclear navigation, URL structure, or internal linking | `site-architecture` 📝 |
| I need a content strategy but I don't know where to start | No plan for what topics to cover or in what order | `content-strategy` 📝 |
| I need to write compelling copy for my website | Blank page, weak headlines, unclear value proposition | `copywriting` 📝, `copy-editing` 📝 |
| I need posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram | Don't know what to post or how to repurpose content | `social-content` 📝 |
| I don't know how to market my product | No marketing ideas, need inspiration | `marketing-ideas` 📝, `marketing-psychology` 📝 |
| I'm about to launch and need a plan | No launch strategy, don't know how to maximize impact | `launch-strategy` 📝 |
| I want to capture emails with free content or tools | No lead magnets, gated content, or free tools | `lead-magnets` 📝, `free-tool-strategy` 📝, `popup-cro` 📝 |

## Get Customers

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| I want to run Google or Facebook ads | No ad strategy, targeting, or budget plan | `paid-ads` 📋, `ad-creative` 📋 |
| I want to reach out to potential customers directly | Cold emails that don't get replies | `cold-email` 📋 |
| I have leads but they're not converting to customers | No email sequences to warm up and nurture leads | `email-sequence` 📋 |
| I want existing customers to bring me new ones | No referral program or viral loop | `referral-program` 📋 |
| My sales team needs better materials | No pitch decks, one-pagers, or objection handling docs | `sales-enablement` 📋 |
| Marketing generates leads but sales doesn't follow up | No lead scoring, routing, or handoff process | `revops` 📋 |
| Prospects are comparing us to competitors | No comparison pages or competitive positioning | `competitor-alternatives` 📋 |

## Convert Visitors

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| People visit my page but don't sign up or buy | Low conversion rate on landing/pricing/feature pages | `page-cro` 📋 |
| People start signing up but don't finish | Friction in registration flow, too many steps or fields | `signup-flow-cro` 📋 |
| My lead capture or contact form has low completion | Too many fields, confusing layout, or unclear value | `form-cro` 📋 |
| Free users aren't upgrading to paid | Weak upgrade prompts, unclear value of paid tier | `paywall-upgrade-cro` 📋 |
| I don't know how to price my product | Unclear pricing model, tiers, or willingness to pay | `pricing-strategy` 📋 |
| I changed something and want to know if it actually helped | No A/B test framework or statistical rigor | `ab-test-setup` 📋 |
| I can't tell what users are doing on my site | No analytics, event tracking, or conversion measurement | `analytics-tracking` 📋 |
| People create accounts but never come back | No onboarding flow, users don't reach the aha moment | `onboarding-cro` 📋 |

## Retain & Grow

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| People keep canceling their subscriptions | No save offers, exit surveys, or win-back flows | `churn-prevention` 📝 |
| Active users are becoming inactive over time | No re-engagement emails or lifecycle communication | `email-sequence` 📋 |
| Revenue isn't growing even though users are growing | Wrong pricing, packaging, or value metric | `pricing-strategy` 📋 |

## Power Tools

| Situation | Problem | Skill |
|-----------|---------|-------|
| I need a production-ready prompt for a specific role or task | Writing good prompts from scratch is slow and inconsistent | `prompt-factory` 📋 |
| I want to build a custom AI agent for my workflow | Need structured agent with proper tools and MCP integration | `agent-factory` 📋 |
| I want a custom slash command for a repeated workflow | Doing the same multi-step task manually every time | `slash-command-factory` 📋 |
| I want Claude Code to automatically do something on events | Need automated behaviors tied to tool calls or file changes | `hook-factory` 📋 |
| I want to install, update, or remove skills | Need to manage the amazing_cc_skills collection | `manage-skills` 📋 |
| I need to create, read, or edit PDF/Word/PowerPoint/Excel files | Need to process office documents programmatically | `pdf` 📋, `docx` 📋, `pptx` 📋, `xlsx` 📋 |
| I need source-grounded answers or real-time search | Need citations from documents or live web/academic data | `notebooklm` 📋, `valyu-best-practices` 📋 |
| I want to restrict edits to one folder while debugging | Risk of accidentally changing unrelated code | `freeze` 📋, `unfreeze` 📋 |
| I need a diagram, chart, or dashboard I can share with others | Need a shareable link to a visualization — not a local file | `visualize` 📋 |
| I want to read my iMessage history or send a text message | Need to search, read, or send messages via Apple Messages (DANGEROUS: reads local DB, debugging only) | `imessage` 📋 |
